allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
\\$src = 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록-서포터v1_사무창.zip'
\\$dst = 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록-서포터v1_사무창'
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
[System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\(\\$src, \\$dst\)
Write-Host 'done'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Copy-Item 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록-서포터v1_사무창.zip' 'C:\\Temp\\product.zip' -Force
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\\Temp\\product' -Force | Out-Null
Expand-Archive -Path 'C:\\Temp\\product.zip' -DestinationPath 'C:\\Temp\\product' -Force
Get-ChildItem 'C:\\Temp\\product' -Recurse | Select-Object FullName
" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록-서포터v1_사무창' -Recurse | Select-Object FullName, Length" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$zip = 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록-서포터v1_사무창.zip'
\\$dst = 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록서포터_설치'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$dst -Force | Out-Null

\\$enc = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8
\\$archive = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open\(\\$zip, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Read, \\$enc\)
foreach \(\\$entry in \\$archive.Entries\) {
    \\$name = \\$entry.FullName
    Write-Host \\$name
    \\$outPath = Join-Path \\$dst \\$name
    if \(\\$name.EndsWith\('/'\) -or \\$name.EndsWith\('\\'\)\) {
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$outPath -Force | Out-Null
    } else {
        \\$dir = Split-Path \\$outPath -Parent
        if \(-not \(Test-Path \\$dir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$dir -Force | Out-Null }
        \\$stream = \\$entry.Open\(\)
        \\$fileStream = [System.IO.File]::Create\(\\$outPath\)
        \\$stream.CopyTo\(\\$fileStream\)
        \\$fileStream.Close\(\)
        \\$stream.Close\(\)
    }
}
\\$archive.Dispose\(\)
Write-Host '완료!'
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem
\\$zip = 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록-서포터v1_사무창.zip'
\\$dst = 'C:\\Users\\윤민지\\Documents\\카카오톡 받은 파일\\상품등록서포터_설치'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$dst -Force | Out-Null

\\$enc = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8
\\$fs = [System.IO.File]::OpenRead\(\\$zip\)
\\$archive = New-Object System.IO.Compression.ZipArchive\(\\$fs, [System.IO.Compression.ZipArchiveMode]::Read, \\$false, \\$enc\)
foreach \(\\$entry in \\$archive.Entries\) {
    \\$name = \\$entry.FullName
    Write-Host \\$name
    \\$outPath = Join-Path \\$dst \\$name
    if \(\\$name.EndsWith\('/'\) -or \\$name.EndsWith\('\\'\)\) {
        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$outPath -Force | Out-Null
    } else {
        \\$dir = Split-Path \\$outPath -Parent
        if \(-not \(Test-Path \\$dir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$dir -Force | Out-Null }
        \\$stream = \\$entry.Open\(\)
        \\$fileStream = [System.IO.File]::Create\(\\$outPath\)
        \\$stream.CopyTo\(\\$fileStream\)
        \\$fileStream.Close\(\)
        \\$stream.Close\(\)
    }
}
\\$archive.Dispose\(\)
\\$fs.Close\(\)
Write-Host '완료!'
" 2>&1)

    \\$outPath = Join-Path \\$dst \\$name

        New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$outPath -Force | Out-Null

        \\$dir = Split-Path \\$outPath -Parent
        if \(-not \(Test-Path \\$dir\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path \\$dir -Force | Out-Null }
        \\$stream = \\$entry.Open\(\)
        \\$fileStream = [System.IO.File]::Create\(\\$outPath\)

}
